dailyNews.description: Melania Trump Denies Epstein Links, Says Claims About It Are Defaming Her

dailyNews.title: Iran says it ‘would be dumb’ for US to let Netanyahu kill diplomacy
dailyNews.description: In an implicit response to JD Vance, Iran's Abbas Araghchi warns of the repercussions of Israel's attacks on Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Republicans block Democrats’ bid to limit Trump’s military actions on Iran
dailyNews.description: While the US-Iran truce has temporarily eased direct hostilities, US lawmakers remain divided over the broader strategy and President Trump’s unilateral decision-making.

dailyNews.title: Iranians rally nationwide to honour late leader Ali Khamenei
dailyNews.description: Thousands gathered across Iran to honor Ali Khamenei, whose assassination marked the start of the US-Israeli attack.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not some piece of ice’: Greenland hits back at Trump insult
dailyNews.description: PM Nielsen calls Greenland a proud nation seeking to maintain global order, after US president calls it 'piece of ice'.

dailyNews.title: Trump pushes Israel PM Netanyahu to ease Lebanon attacks amid ceasefire concerns — Report
dailyNews.description: The appeal underscores Washington’s concern that escalating violence in Lebanon could undermine ongoing diplomatic efforts with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump ‘very optimistic’ on Iran deal as Vance-led delegation heads to Pakistan for talks
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Thursday (local time) said that he is very optimistic regarding a peace deal with Iran, adding that it is definitely within reach as US Vice President JD Vance-led delegation heads to Pakistan for talks on 10th April.

dailyNews.title: Zohran Mamdani on 100 days as New York mayor
dailyNews.description: NYC’s mayor reflects on childcare, housing, bigotry, Iran and the future of the Democratic Party.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran Peace Talks: Trump Warns Of 'Very Painful' Outcome If Tehran Rejects Deal
dailyNews.description: The US agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran, 90 minutes before Trump's deadline to wipe out civilisation from the West Asian nation was to end.

dailyNews.title: US Democrats warn Trump that Iran ceasefire must apply to Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Democratic lawmakers tell White House that allowing Israel to continue to bomb Lebanon could reignite the regional war.

dailyNews.title: Does a US-Iran ceasefire mean the end of the war?
dailyNews.description: After a US-Iran ceasefire deal, strikes slow but tensions remain. Will this hold or collapse?

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Kahlil Gibran: ‘Trust in dreams, for in them is….’
dailyNews.description: Kahlil Gibran, a prominent Lebanese-American writer, emphasised the importance of dreams in personal growth and spiritual fulfillment. His quote encourages faith in aspirations as gateways to deeper understanding and purpose, reflecting his belief in the transformative power of inner visions.

dailyNews.title: IMF warns of looming inflation crisis on back of US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: The conflict has driven up prices of oil, natural gas, damaged refineries and other energy infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Israeli strikes in Lebanon 'grave violation' of ceasefire, Iran minister tells BBC
dailyNews.description: Iran's deputy foreign minister says the US must choose between 'war and ceasefire'.

dailyNews.title: Congress to hold CWC meet on April 10 to discuss women's quota law amendments, delimitation, West Asia crisis
dailyNews.description: Top leaders of Congress will deliberate on the government's move to amend the women's reservation law, proposed delimitation exercise and the West Asia conflict issue, among other important matters, they said.

dailyNews.title: Iran limits Strait of Hormuz transit to 15 ships daily under US ceasefire deal — Report
dailyNews.description: The Strait — a critical maritime corridor between Iran and Oman — handles about 20% of global oil and key commodities, making any restriction a major concern for global markets.

dailyNews.title: UK defense minister warns Putin of 'serious consequences' after covert underwater military operation
dailyNews.description: U.K. Defense Minister John Healey has revealed a major military operation involving the Royal Navy and Norway to deter Russian submarines in the North Sea.

dailyNews.title: Plane door opens in midair moments after takeoff, leaving flight passengers stunned and social media buzzing
dailyNews.description: A Cape Air flight heading to Boston, Massachusetts, turned back to Nantucket after its cabin door partially opened in midair shortly after takeoff from the airport.

dailyNews.title: Federal appeals court rejects Anthropic bid to block Pentagon blacklist in AI dispute
dailyNews.description: A federal court rejected Anthropic's bid to block the Department of War from blacklisting the artificial intelligence company's technology.

dailyNews.title: NATO chief says world is ‘absolutely’ safer under Trump
dailyNews.description: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte says the world is safer under President Trump, pointing to U.S. military actions targeting Iran's capabilities.

dailyNews.title: NATO chief signals allies may act on Hormuz, warns of ‘unhealthy codependence’ on US
dailyNews.description: Rutte signals a possible coalition to secure the Strait of Hormuz after meeting Trump, but the White House says NATO was tested and already failed.

dailyNews.title: Five arrested in alleged $267M hospice fraud scheme that exploited California's Medi-Cal system
dailyNews.description: Officials allege a $267 million hospice fraud scheme in California used stolen identities and shell companies to bill Medi-Cal for fake patient care.

dailyNews.title: Carville predicts Trump won't be president next year, threatens Democratic retribution
dailyNews.description: Democratic strategist James Carville predicted Wednesday that President Trump won't be president next year, vowing Democrats will go after corruption if they regain office.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump denounces 'lies' connecting her with disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein in White House event
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump addressed the 'lies' linking her to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein during a statement delivered from the White House on Thursday afternoon.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not a Victim of Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse of victims. She called on Congress to continue investigating.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.title: In a Deep Red Town In Pennsylvania, Locals Vent Over a Planned ICE Detention Center
dailyNews.description: The Tremont, Pa., area has roughly 2,000 residents and limited resources. The Trump administration plans to convert a warehouse there to hold nearly four times as many people.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Push Allies to Pursue Antifa and Far Left as Terrorist Threats
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration aims to deploy counterterrorism tools against far-left groups, even as it has offered little evidence they present a dire threat.

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From the U.S. Push Against the Far Left
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has made countering antifa and other far-left groups a counterterrorism priority, despite increasing threats from the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly
dailyNews.description: Democratic politicians are swearing with glee. It is usually aimed at President Trump.

dailyNews.title: ‘This War Isn’t Over’: 3 Opinion Writers Debate What Has to Happen Next in Iran
dailyNews.description: Will the shooting really stop? What should be Trump’s red lines? A discussion on where America’s war on Iran stands.

dailyNews.title: First lady Melania Trump slams "baseless lies" tying her to Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump delivered a televised statement denying a relationship with the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump's ceasefire with Iran mired in dispute over Israel's war in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: As Trump issues a new warning to Iran to comply with a tenuous two-week ceasefire, the two sides don't even seem to agree on the terms of the deal.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump denies relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, Ghislaine Maxwell
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump slammed "baseless lies" tying her to Jeffrey Epstein in a statement Thursday at the White House.
